description: Named-trainer + signature-Pokemon canonical pair. Acerola owns a named Shiny Mimikyu (Mimikins, canonically the ghost of a deceased Mimikyu); Mimikyu is her signature partner across Pokemon Sun and Moon (Thrifty Megamart Trial Totem), the anime, and Pokemon Masters EX. Mirrored bidirectionally on `## Connections` sections of both cards. Edgelord notes: the Mimikyu species's loneliness-and-disguise lore composes with Acerola's Aether House caretaker role on the canonical caretaker-of-the-lonely + lonely-creature-in-disguise axis — this is among the franchise's most explicitly designer-coordinated trainer-and-signature-Pokemon pairings, and the edge is load-bearing on canon, not on tag bridge. Professional sigh on the mirror.
citations: [Pokemon Sun and Moon, Game Freak 2016, primary canon]
